Task description explicitly instructs to set End Period to '2025-12-31'.
Task description explicitly instructs to set Payment Duration to 'Net 30'.

Task description and setup_task.sh PHP injection script synthetically create this Service.

Task description specifies List Price as 450.00, and setup_task.sh synthetically sets the unit_price of the service to 450.00.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the prerequisite Organization ('Global Trade Corp') and Service ('Enterprise Printer Lease & Maintenance' with a unit price of 450.00) are synthetically generated and injected into the CRM database via setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected recurring Sales Order properties, including a 'Monthly' frequency from '2025-01-01' to '2025-12-31' and status 'Approved', exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the task description.
